name: Jake Fons
subject: I had to email you tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This is our first week after the primary and we know GOP donors are already flooding our opponent's campaign with contributions.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a0d7/c1f7015/6a66d5a2/1141bc35/1592967731/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180817PM_em-full&recurring=auto") Friends, the latest poll shows this race is within FOUR points, Trump and big GOP donors are targeting us for defeat, and yesterday **Newt Gingrich wrote for _Fox News_ there are _"big problems for the entire Democratic ticket in the general election"_ here in Minnesota.** If we want to stop Republicans and Trump from turning this Senate seat red, we need every member of this grassroots team to give right now. **[Can you chip in to protect this critical Senate seat from turning red?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a0d7/c1f7015/6a66d5a2/1141bc35/1592967731/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180817PM_em-full&recurring=auto")** **[CHIP IN $5](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a0d7/c1f7015/6a66d5a2/1141bc35/1592967731/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180817PM_em-full&recurring=auto")** This is our first week after the primary and we know GOP donors are already flooding our opponent's campaign with contributions. **And after falling short of our mid-month goal, I 'm worried we won't have the resources to respond to the special interest attacks already on the airwaves.** This is a make or break time -- what you do now will determine if we can hold off the attacks from Trump, Pence, and all the dark money groups putting this race at the top of their target list. **[Please chip $5 or whatever you can so we can defend this seat and stop Republicans from turning Minnesota red in November. We're relying on this grassroots team to be the difference in this race.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a0d7/c1f7015/6a66d5a2/1141bc35/1592967731/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-august_poll?refcode=rtw_20180817PM_em-full&recurring=auto")** Thank you, Jake Fons
Finance Director
---

body:
(https://actionnetwork.org/forms/bluewavevoters/)

Activist,

Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh's Senate confirmation hearings start September 4, but we can't wait until then to act.

This confirmation will affect policy for decades to come -- with Roe v Wade and women's reproductive freedom especially in danger.

Now more than ever, we need to show that a huge Blue Wave is coming in November, and those in power need to fear us - both Republicans who are trying to steal our rights, and Democrats who need to fight harder to protect us.

Will you pledge to vote for Democrats, increasing the pressure to reject Kavanaugh? (https://actionnetwork.org/forms/bluewavevoters?source=direct_link&referrer=group-democratscom)

(https://actionnetwork.org/forms/bluewavevoters?source=direct_link&referrer=group-democratscom)

If we turn out 50 million Democrats - 5 million more than Republicans turned out in the Tea Party revolt of 2010 - we can win every key race. Everywhere.

And we can reach this goal because 66 million Democrats voted in 2016, so we just need 3 out of 4 Democratic voters to vote again in 2018.

Congress, governors, and 6,000 state legislative seats are on the ballot this year. If we elect more Democrats, we can put greater checks on the Trump Administration, protect our fundamental rights, and prevent the court from turning even more conservative. (https://actionnetwork.org/forms/bluewavevoters?source=direct_link&referrer=group-democratscom)

(https://actionnetwork.org/forms/bluewavevoters?source=direct_link&referrer=group-democratscom)

Take the pledge to join the Blue Wave in 2018 and beyond. (https://actionnetwork.org/forms/bluewavevoters?source=direct_link&referrer=group-democratscom) We need Democratic leaders to see that we’re focused on winning, and we expect them to fight for us.

Join our Facebook community (http://www.facebook.com/groups/bluewavevoters/) where fellow resisters and progressives share encouragement to keep up the momentum, and follow us on Twitter (http://twitter.com/bluewavevoters) to stay up to date.

Thanks for helping save America - and the world!

Bob Fertik

President Trump called the new National Defense Authorization Act “the most significant investment in our military, and in our war fighters, in modern history” while speaking to troops at Fort Drum, New York.
##

Once again, they’ve missed.”
##

body:
Friends, can you guess what has the biggest impact on getting people to vote for Mel?

It isn't TV ads or good press (but both are important). It isn't even hearing from Mel himself.

It's you.

Undecided voters are most likely to swing towards Mel--and voters who like him are most likely to strengthen their opinions--after hearing from someone they know and trust.

[**That 's why we need you to endorse Mel's campaign. Sign up to endorse Mel Hall for Congress today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZpBX39WVDowPkPdpzPfGak33XUYp72UfxtwaL3ShSJA=/09KQ_KzjECHWxjCOUyqQaQ7XFQmIjGzGAIkqXTSs7U4=)

Mel is campaigning to bring Hoosier values to D.C. And it's people like you who live those values every day in Indiana's 2nd Congressional District who are critical to persuading the voters we need to win this election.

You can endorse Mel in three easy steps:
Step 1: [**Follow the link to say you endorse Mel**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZpBX39WVDowPkPdpzPfGak33XUYp72UfxtwaL3ShSJA=/09KQ_KzjECHWxjCOUyqQaQ7XFQmIjGzGAIkqXTSs7U4=)
Step 2: Tell us a bit about why you support him
Step 3: Check the box if you'd be willing to record a short video about your support.

And just like that, we can make sure your voice is heard by your friends, neighbors, and other voters in the district.

[**It takes just a few minutes to endorse Mel and his campaign for Congress. Do so today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZpBX39WVDowPkPdpzPfGak33XUYp72UfxtwaL3ShSJA=/09KQ_KzjECHWxjCOUyqQaQ7XFQmIjGzGAIkqXTSs7U4=)

Max Harris

Friend,

**The NC ballot shouldn 't be a riddle. Or a lie.**

That's the headline of an editorial from the News & Observer that railed against Republican legislative leaders' plan to wreck our constitution with harmful and unnecessary amendments. It goes on to say:

_N.C. House Speaker Tim Moore and state Senate leader Phil Berger, knowing their veto-proof control of the legislature is in jeopardy, are rushing to do last-minute surgery on the state Constitution using a hammer and a screwdriver._

This is what we're dealing with, Friend. Republican leaders know we're working to break their majority, so they're doing everything they can to destroy important checks and balances that North Carolina has had for years.

**I'm standing up for North Carolinians and we're fighting this in court. name: Cheryl Bost, MSEA
subject: Add your name if you support great schools
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Our students and teachers deserve the best.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b623/7ab0e2c4/7fd9b22a/349b7688/1324644909/VEsH/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/support-great-schools?source=OHQ08188A") Friend, I see this campaign through the lens of my hardworking students at Mars Estates Elementary School -- a high-poverty school in Essex, Maryland. There are hundreds of thousands of students just like them across the state that lack equal opportunities, appropriate staffing, and the resources that faculty and staff need to help students living in poverty be successful in school. Investing in education and providing the support that all students deserve has to be what this election is about. When I taught there, based on state test scores, we were considered a "failing school" -- and the state wanted to take us over. But instead, the teachers, staff, and community of the school got together, put forward a plan to truly address our students' needs, and turned that school around. Not only did we improve test scores, but we improved the overall culture and success of the school and community. So I know a good education plan when I see one. [**Add your name next to mine if you support Ben's plan to make ALL Maryland schools equal and great.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b623/7ab0e2c4/7fd9b22a/349b7688/1324644909/VEsE/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/support-great-schools?source=OHQ08188A") | [SIGN ON »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b623/7ab0e2c4/7fd9b22a/349b7688/1324644909/VEsF/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/support-great-schools?source=OHQ08188A")
---
Ben's plan is based on his life, because he knows from experience that there are too many barriers preventing families from being able to give more to their children than they received themselves. He and his family worked hard to get him from the Baltimore projects to Oxford as a Rhodes Scholar, but sometimes hard work simply isn't enough.
That's why he's committed to raising teacher pay by 29% to be more competitive with surrounding states, and to end the era of educators earning less than a living wage. He's also investing in Maryland's most impoverished school districts to fight concentrated poverty through community schools.
And lastly, he's going to end student debt, and make it possible for every Marylander to attend community college, a public university, or learn a trade for free.
**This is a plan that will work, and it will work now. That's why I'm so excited to support Ben for governor of Maryland --** [**if you are too, add your name now to support his plan to make Maryland schools the best they can be.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b623/7ab0e2c4/7fd9b22a/349b7688/1324644909/VEsC/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/support-great-schools?source=OHQ08188A")
Thanks,
Cheryl

President
Maryland State Education Association

**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**

**_A Note From Wayne_**
Dear Derek,
A united party is a party that wins.
There are 400 State Representatives. 24 State Senators. 5 Executive Councilors. 2 Congressional Districts. 1 Governor and over 70 county offices up for election this year.
When we also consider delegates to the state convention, there are going to be a lot of Republican names on the September 11th Primary Ballot.
It's important for Republicans to have vigorous and spirited primaries, so that we can effectively discuss our principles as a party.
Ovide Lamontagne was quick and vigorous in his uniting message behind Kelly Ayotte in 2010, after the Republican U.S. Senate primary.
Frank Edelblut did not waste any time to showcase Republican unity behind Chris Sununu, once the votes were all tallied after the 2016 gubernatorial primary.
In both elections, the Republican nominees were successful in New Hampshire general elections, because our Party came together and those who were once primary rivals all joined together to win.
Unfortunately, we can all remember elections where primary fights carry over into the general election, causing Republicans to stay home or skip a particular name on the ballot.
Republicans have a lot to be proud of since President Trump and Governor Sununu were inaugurated in January of 2017 and we have great records to run on this November.
As summer winds down and the Primary approaches, we look forward to seeing the candidates continue their hard work on the campaign trail. I hope that you are able to join us for our Unity Breakfast on Thursday, September 13th, as the general election campaigns begin. More details about the breakfast will be published next week!
Sincerely,
Wayne MacDonald

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, AUGUST 17th | A Note From Wayne Dear Derek, A united party is a party that wins. There are 400 State Representatives. 24 State Senators. 5 Executive Councilors. 2 Congressional Districts. 1 Governor and over 70 county offices up for election this year. When we also consider delegates to the state convention, there are going to be a lot of Republican names on the September 11th Primary Ballot. It's important for Republicans to have vigorous and spirited primaries, so that we can effectively discuss our principles as a party. Ovide Lamontagne was quick and vigorous in his uniting message behind Kelly Ayotte in 2010, after the Republican U.S. Senate primary. Frank Edelblut did not waste any time to showcase Republican unity behind Chris Sununu, once the votes were all tallied after the 2016 gubernatorial primary. In both elections, the Republican nominees were successful in New Hampshire general elections, because our Party came together and those who were once primary rivals all joined together to win. Unfortunately, we can all remember elections where primary fights carry over into the general election, causing Republicans to stay home or skip a particular name on the ballot. Republicans have a lot to be proud of since President Trump and Governor Sununu were inaugurated in January of 2017 and we have great records to run on this November. As summer winds down and the Primary approaches, we look forward to seeing the candidates continue their hard work on the campaign trail. I hope that you are able to join us for our Unity Breakfast on Thursday, September 13th, as the general election campaigns begin. More details about the breakfast will be published next week! name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: whatever happens next is up to us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
I can't be bought by big donors and special interests.
#

Peter -
As you know, I can't be bought by big donors and special interests. We're running a different kind of campaign: I'm the only candidate in this race who has **rejected all corporate money -- no corporate PACs, no LLCs.**
But that means there's no huge Wall Street fat cat or massive developer out there who is going to swoop in and save the day with a big ad buy or massive donations in these final weeks. Those are the folks who want to beat us.
So whatever happens next is up to us. We'll sink or we'll swim in this race, but we'll do it together. So that's why -- with time running out -- I have to ask:
**[Will you make a $3 donation to our grassroots campaign today? We're powered by people like you giving small amounts of money in response to emails like this. I cannot do this alone.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ec2/6e822e2f/1a0be2a4/41725d4c/3093547858/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august?refcode=em180818-full")**
Peter - People said it was impossible to run a competitive statewide campaign in New York without taking corporate money. But we have a real chance of winning this race, and if we win, we will forever change what people think is possible.
Winning this race means electing an independent Attorney General who will root out the corruption poisoning our politics. But it's up to us to do it.
So if you can, please chip in $3 to help fund our grassroots campaign:
**[https://go.zephyrforny.com/August](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ec2/6e822e2f/1a0be2a4/41725d4c/3093547858/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august?refcode=em180818-full")**
Thanks for being part of this.
\- Zephyr

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
South Bend Mayor Pete Buttigieg, who is rarely in South Bend as he attends to his pipe dream political ambitions, became unhinged... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/this-has-to-stop-467157?e=1acd9bb3d6)

|

---
| | Friends -

You can officially add South Bend Mayor Pete Buttigieg to the list of Democrat Joe Donnelly supporters who become unhinged when talking about President Donald J. Trump.

On Thursday, pinch-hitting for former Vice President Joe Biden at a gathering of liberal Democrats at the Illinois State Fair this week, Rarely-in-South Bend Mayor Buttigieg left Hoosier Hospitality at home. According to the [_Chicago Sun-Times_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fc24087be5&e=1acd9bb3d6), the typically mind-mannered Democrat said President Trump is "basically a disgraced game show host" and that Vice President Pence is a "social extremist, the likes of which our country has not known in national politics." Buttigieg even punctuated his remarks with an unprintable word, "B——," according to the report.

Friends, Pete Buttigieg is just the latest supporter of Democrat Donnelly to attack President Trump and Vice President Pence. This is what we are fighting against this year. Folks like Buttigieg, who is spending more time attending to his pipe dream political ambitions than to the problems of South Bend, are becoming more and more desperate in their words and in their actions. They can't stand the fact that our economy is booming, that unemployment is at record lows, and that America is respected again.

When it comes to Mayor Buttigieg, though, just like his pal Democrat Joe Donnelly, who has been playing political games with President Trump's Supreme Court nominee, Buttigieg should stop playing games and just do his job. Or he should do us all a favor and step aside to focus full-time on what his [own donors think is a pipe dream](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=485faea0ff&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Barack Obama, Joe Donnelly and Pete Buttigieg. They are Democrat peas in a pod who put their party's interests ahead of the interests of Hoosiers.

Sincerely,

Kyle Hupfer
Indiana Republican Party Chairman

name: Kathy Manning
subject: When women succeed, America succeeds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Team, **When women succeed, America succeeds.** I firmly believe that, and we need representatives in Washington who believe that too. I think about this every time Congress attacks women's health care and family planning. We see it every time Washington politicians try to limit access to birth control. We see it as Congress continues to ignore workplace inequality and the disparity in pay between men and women. **It's just plain wrong.** As your Congresswoman, I will fight for the rights and empowerment of women and families every step of the way. Today is our Women's Day of Action! Our incredible grassroots organizing team will be training women volunteers, making phone calls, and knocking on doors to share our message with voters across North Carolina's 13th District. **And all of you -- our dedicated online team -- will be a part of it, too. [We want to get 180 people to give $18 to support this campaign and our fight to protect women's rights. Will you be one of them?](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279ca/e3b7d3/5df3623f/255525ab/1810618101/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180818am?refcode=kme180818am_m&recurring=true&amount=18")** I will not waver in my commitments to women's equality. But before I can fight for the rights of women and families across North Carolina, I need your help. Our opponent is still ahead in the polls, buoyed by help from his Washington special interest pals. [**Chip in $18 today and help us close the gap.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279ca/e3b7d3/5df3623f/255525ab/1810618101/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180818am?refcode=kme180818am_m&recurring=true&amount=18") | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279ca/e3b7d3/5df3623f/255525ab/1810618101/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180818am?refcode=kme180818am_m&recurring=true&amount=18")
---
I am so grateful for all of your support, today and every day.
Thank you,
Kathy

name: Survey Alert (via Sinema HQ)
subject: asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
We need your input now. |
---
|
---
|
Here's a sample of Joe Arpaio's record as sheriff:
* Charged Arizona taxpayers over $70 million to pay for his legal fees
* Oversaw the worst pattern of racial profiling by a law enforcement agency in U.S. history
* Promoted the "birther" lie about President Obama
* Described by the _New York Times_ as "America's Worst Sheriff"

Now he's looking for a promotion and running for U.S. Senate.

**[We want to hear from you: do you want Sheriff Joe Arpaio to be Arizona's next Senator?](http://act.kyrstensinema. Friend, I hope you’ve heard the big news by now.

President Trump tweeted his endorsement of our campaign this week!

I screencapped it for you in my previous email, and I am including it for you below.

I am so humbled by President Trump’s fierce support and I am overjoyed that a strong leader who helped us win historic victories in so many "blue" states has faith we will succeed in November.

With President Trump and the grassroots support of Wisconsin by my side, I am more confident than ever that we will defeat Tammy Baldwin and help President Trump put an END to Washington dysfunction!

Friend, I hope you’ll join me and President Trump by chipping in $25 today: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=f37d18f34aac49d0a44274fdaf871af3&_e=YNdqASLjtB72Cb5T056M_qMXvZuCi481qhhWC_KQAnCG41t4ZIckyXGKY5rXNs7KarYNPN54DJEFFNdSvQA75ltSV-6U5TljEaPBu5estXUpIdsNk2bc4voMMFRxtpjjol6UYNDKZNONi5xOvxSp4w8eL9x_e-rgMkron8O6mZEpI1sgC0q00qWWfIOpHDaEDQQBDgC8rI-Wr3jRO5NrClkVXgjQs2vRSc3_mu-jj6CUpYukdAYEMz0c9CFMaZdzbc4PmwpjCLNFei5kDtbArKqOXeMLp6s7ejjTQTXpjsc05zIdDiDRF7uAnRvXAYeRhWqeGcC8ZEC8MVEDBcPZqM3adrLtStzmxBYpXeGB176-W8uDbAtWedMGkyvY2uvfLraAQg7qKiPVBt6YuRpPV8lcUdipH-F8rL_-bSZkhM1kdnNyeQyhWMi7WrKofQVo)**

Friend, the Washington establishment thinks they can silence us. They think if they spend enough money in Wisconsin, Tammy Baldwin will win, and they can continue forcing their radical agenda on Wisconsin.

They think our campaign is a lost cause!

But let me tell you, I’ve heard that a few times before:
1. Most recently, they said President Trump had no chance at turning Wisconsin red.
2. When I ran for state Senate, the elites in Madison told me, point blank, “you will never get anything done if you vote with the conservative wing in the party.”

Friend, they were wrong then. And they’re wrong now!

President Trump won bigger in Wisconsin than any Republican since Reagan, and I worked with Governor Walker to usher in an era of conservative change in Wisconsin – WITHOUT compromising any of my values.

I know there’s NOTHING we cannot do if we work hard and, friend, I can’t wait to prove the naysayers wrong once again.

With President Trump and the Wisconsin grassroots by my side, I am more confident than ever that we will defeat Tammy Baldwin and help President Trump put an END to Washington dysfunction!

Friend, I hope you’ve heard the big news by now. President Trump tweeted his endorsement of our campaign this week! I screencapped it for you in my previous email, and I am including it for you below. I am so humbled by President Trump’s fierce support and I am overjoyed that a strong leader who helped us win historic victories in so many "blue" states has faith we will succeed in November. With President Trump and the grassroots support of Wisconsin by my side, I am more confident than ever that we will defeat Tammy Baldwin and help President Trump put an END to Washington dysfunction! President Donald Trump endorsed my campaign for Senate and, friend, I could not be more proud. Friend, this is huge for us. If you remember right, President Trump won Wisconsin big in 2016. And I know why! Here in Wisconsin, we’re real, hard-working Americans who are fed up with status quo politics. President Trump offered us a chance to DRAIN THE SWAMP, and we took it! Now, we have another chance to stand with President Trump to drain the swamp and defeat Tammy Baldwin in November. But friend, I won’t be able to do it without you. Liberals in Washington are going to do everything they can to make sure WE LOSE so Tammy Baldwin can continue her obstructionist ways in the Senate. Today, I need you to join President Trump and chip in to help us defeat Baldwin! Friend, the Washington establishment thinks they can silence us. They think if they spend enough money in Wisconsin, Tammy Baldwin will win, and they can continue forcing their radical agenda on Wisconsin. They think our campaign is a lost cause! But let me tell you, I’ve heard that a few times before: 1. Most recently, they said President Trump had no chance at turning Wisconsin red. 2. When I ran for state Senate, the elites in Madison told me, point blank, “you will never get anything done if you vote with the conservative wing in the party.” Friend, they were wrong then. And they’re wrong now! President Trump won bigger in Wisconsin than any Republican since Reagan, and I worked with Governor Walker to usher in an era of conservative change in Wisconsin – WITHOUT compromising any of my values. I know there’s NOTHING we cannot do if we work hard and, friend, I can’t wait to prove the naysayers wrong once again. Team,
**When women succeed, America succeeds.** I firmly believe that, and we need representatives in Washington who believe that too.
I think about this every time Congress attacks women's health care and family planning. We see it every time Washington politicians try to limit access to birth control. We see it as Congress continues to ignore workplace inequality and the disparity in pay between men and women.
**It's just plain wrong.** As your Congresswoman, I will fight for the rights and empowerment of women and families every step of the way.
Today is our Women's Day of Action! Our incredible grassroots organizing team will be training women volunteers, making phone calls, and knocking on doors to share our message with voters across North Carolina's 13th District.
